label: TNEA 2026 Notification Issued
description: Official notification by Directorate of Technical Education, Chennai. Marks the start of the 2026 admission cycle.

label: Online Registration Opens
description: Candidates can register and start filling the application at tneaonline.org. Originals can be uploaded from this date.

label: Last Date for Registration & Fee Payment
description: Final day to submit the online application and pay the registration fee (Rs.500 for OC/BC/BCM/MBC, Rs.250 for SC/SCA/ST).

label: Last Date for Certificate Upload
description: Final day to upload all required original certificates (10th, HSC, NATA score, community, nativity, etc.).

label: Online Certificate Verification
description: Uploaded certificates are verified online at TFCs. Sports persons attend in-person verification at Chennai.

label: Publication of Rank List
description: Combined merit list (board 200 + NATA/JEE 200 = 400) published on the TNEA portal.

label: Grievance Redressal Window
description: One week to file rank-list grievances in person at the Office of Secretary TNEA or nearby TFCs.

label: Special Reservation Counselling (Online)
description: Counselling for Differently Abled, Ex-Servicemen wards, and Eminent Sports Persons happens first.

label: General Counselling Begins (Online)
description: Academic round and 7.5% Government School preferential round run simultaneously online.

label: SCA to SC Counselling (Online)
description: Reallocation round where vacant SC seats may be filled from SCA category.

label: End of Counselling
description: Final closure of all TNEA B.Arch 2026 counselling rounds.
